---
toc: false
title-block-banner: resources/banner.png
include-back-link: false
page-layout: full
listing:
    - id: python_they_wrote
      contents: "episodes/ep_*/index.qmd"
      sort: "name desc"
      type: grid
      grid-columns: 1
      categories: false
      template: episodes/listing-wide.ejs
      max-items: 1
---

<style>
body {
	text-align: center;
}

.quarto-listing {
    justify-content: center;
    justify-items: center;
}

.columns {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

/* Left align text column */
.left-text {
    text-align: left;
}

/* Right align image column */
.right-image {
    text-align: right;
}

</style>

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width='47.5%' .right-image}

![](resources/podcast_logo.png){height=400}

:::

::: {.column width='5%'}

:::

::: {.column width='47.5%' .left-text}
## Solving the Mysteries of Healthcare Data Science and Modelling

Welcome to the home of 'Python She Wrote' - the podcast of the Health Service Modelling Associates (HSMA) programme.

Join us as we put on our sleuthing hats and interview the people who can help us unravel the mystery of how to do data science better - one fascinating story at a time.
:::

::::

</br>

## Most Recent Episode


:::{#python_they_wrote}
:::

<br/><br/>

---

```{=html}
<div class="value-grid-box-2" style="justify-content:center; text-align:center;">
  <a href="https://podcast.hsma.co.uk/episodes" class="value-box bg-red">
    <div class="icon" style="font-size: 2rem;"><i class="bi bi-headphones"></i></div>
    <div class="details">Click here to listen to our past episodes</div>
  </a>
  <a href="https://hsma.co.uk" class="value-box bg-red">
    <div class="icon" style="font-size: 2rem;"><i class="fa-solid fa-chalkboard-user"></i></div>
    <div class="details">Click here to find out more about the HSMA programme</div>
  </a>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="value-grid-box-2" style="justify-content:center; text-align:center;">
  <a href="https://hsma.co.uk/hsma_content/modules/modules.html" class="value-box bg-red">
    <div class="icon" style="font-size: 2rem;"><i class="bi bi-camera-reels"></i></div>
    <div class="details">Click here to access our HSMA 6 content recordings, slides and sample code</div>
  </a>
  <a href="https://hsma.co.uk/hsma_content/books/books.html" class="value-box bg-red">
    <div class="icon" style="font-size: 2rem;"><i class="bi bi-book"></i></div>
    <div class="details">Click here to view our teach-yourself ebooks on Python, geographic modelling, simulation (and more)</div>
  </a>
</div>
```
